title: Antibes and Cap d'Antibes — Activities near Mas du Chanoine
description: Antibes and Cap d'Antibes: discover this activity near our guesthouse on the French Riviera.
paragraphs: Halfway between Nice and Cannes, the seaside resort of Antibes Juan les Pins has long sandy beaches where you can practice all water sports.

Start your day with a visit to the old town. Every morning, Cours Massena hosts a market with local products. Nearby is Vauban Harbor where you can admire sailing boats, yachts and the most luxurious ships in the world.
On the Art side, the Picasso Museum occupies the Grimaldi Castle, a magnificent medieval building.

In the early afternoon, discover Cap d'Antibes. You can hike along the "Tirepoil" coastal path to the Lighthouse. You can see Villa Eilenroc as well as huge properties with lush gardens. It is also in the bay of La Garoupe that you can choose to swim or spend a relaxing day on a private beach.
